revision.comment: bypass redirect [[Circle (country subdivision)]] → [[Circle (administrative division)]]
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Infobox_religious_building]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot

mass editing broken parameters

Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox religious building]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Wbm1058|wikipedia>Wbm1058]]

Converting [[Module:Infobox mapframe]] call to use newly improved function. See [[Template_talk:Infobox_mapframe#Weird_preview_%22bug%22?|this thread]] for details on the change.
1 revision imported: overwriting this page since it for some reason started to get issues
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes
Converting [[Module:Infobox mapframe]] call to use newly improved function. See [[Template_talk:Infobox_mapframe#Weird_preview_%22bug%22?|this thread]] for details on the change.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Converting [[Module:Infobox mapframe]] call to use newly improved function. See [[Template_talk:Infobox_mapframe#Weird_preview_%22bug%22?|this thread]] for details on the change.
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
